sections.title: Lunch And Dinner Menu
items: Allergen Note Allergen Note Please inform a manager or Chef's Assistant prior to ordering if someone in your party requires special dietary accommodations
Allergen Note Please inform a manager or Chef's Assistant prior to ordering if someone in your party requires special dietary accommodations
Please inform a manager or Chef's Assistant prior to ordering if someone in your party requires special dietary accommodations

Entrees All entrees are served with a garlic knot and side salad. Combos also include a single serve fountain soda. Gluten-free pasta is available upon request. Chicken Fettuccine Alfredo Combo - roasted chicken breast, fettuccine pasta, creamy alfredo sauce, garlic knot Chicken Fettuccine Alfredo Platter(PS, SES, TNS)- roasted chicken breast, fettuccine pasta, creamy alfredo sauce, garlic knot Spaghetti & Meatballs Combo - beef & pork meatballs, spaghetti noodles, marinara sauce, parmesan herb topping, garlic knot Spaghetti & Meatballs Platter(PS, SES, SFS, TNS)- beef & pork meatballs, spaghetti noodles, marinara sauce, parmesan herb topping, garlic knot Vegan Roasted Vegetable Fettuccine Combo - oven roasted mushrooms, squash, zucchini, sun-dried tomato pesto, fettuccine pasta, garlic knot, side salad Vegan Roasted Vegetable Fettuccine Platter(DS, ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS, VG)- oven roasted mushrooms, squash, zucchini, sun-dried tomato pesto, fettuccine pasta, garlic knot, side salad

Fantastic Finishes All bakery items are made in a facility where cross-contamination with gluten, soy, peanuts, and tree nuts is possible. S'mores Cookie(FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)- chocolate chips, toasted marshmallow and graham cracker crumbs Superhero Cheesecake Cup(FS, PS, SES, SFS, V)- layered NY cheesecake, cake crumbles, whipped topping, mixed berry compote, topped with macaron shield Watermelon Bowl(DS, ES, FS, GS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, VG)- Pineapple Bowl(DS, ES, FS, GS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS, VG)-

Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cups Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup - Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 3–6 souvenir cups for each, 2 for each, or 1 for at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice. Extra day of refills for Freestyle® Cup - Add an extra day of refills thru the day* to your previously purchased Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.
